config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters deeply, but it should not automatically come before the rights of the individual, because individual rights are what protect people from abuse by the majority or by the state. In my view, a healthy society is built by respecting personal dignity, freedom, and due process, while still allowing limited restrictions when there is a clear public need. I do not believe collective interests should be used as a blanket excuse to override individual rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat bagaimana mayoritas atau pemerintah bisa salah dan menyalahgunakan kuasa kalau hak pribadi tidak diproteksi kuat. Saya setuju bahwa ada situasi tertentu, seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, di mana pembatasan terbatas bisa dibenarkan, tetapi harus jelas, proporsional, dan bisa diuji. Kalau tidak, alasan “demi masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membungkam kebebasan berbicara, privasi, dan proses hukum yang adil. Jadi, prioritas yang sehat bukan memilih salah satu secara mutlak, melainkan menjaga hak individu sebagai batas utama bagi kepentingan kolektif.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because that is exactly how abuse gets normalized. From my perspective in Indonesia, I have seen how easily “for the public good” can be used to pressure people into silence, conformity, or unfair treatment, especially when institutions are weak or power is concentrated. Society does matter, but it is strongest when individual rights are protected first and any limits are narrow, necessary, and accountable. If the collective can override personal rights too easily, then the individual has no real protection at all.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh ditempatkan di atas hak individu secara otomatis, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa. Poin tentang kebutuhan publik memang valid, tetapi justru karena itu pembatasan harus sangat sempit, proporsional, dan bisa diuji, bukan diberi cek kosong kepada negara atau mayoritas. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; bagi saya, itu adalah batas yang mencegah masyarakat berubah menjadi alat penindasan. Kalau prioritas kolektif selalu menang, kebebasan berbicara, privasi, dan due process jadi terlalu rapuh.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should never automatically override the rights of the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “for the common good” can become a shortcut for silencing criticism or treating ordinary people unfairly. That said, I do not believe individual rights are absolute in every situation; public health, safety, and disaster response can justify limits, but only when they are narrow, necessary, and accountable. The problem is that once society is given priority as a principle, the burden often falls on the weakest people to prove they deserve protection. For me, a decent society is not one that demands obedience first, but one that protects each person enough that collective power cannot be abused.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara otomatis di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman saya melihat politik dan hukum di Amerika, dalih “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pengawasan berlebihan, pembungkaman, atau perlakuan tidak adil terhadap minoritas. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi pembatasan harus benar-benar sempit, proporsional, dan bisa diuji di pengadilan. Bagi saya, hak individu bukan lawan dari kepentingan sosial; justru itu pagar yang mencegah masyarakat dan negara menyalahgunakan kekuasaannya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
